statement: In every magma, Equation 1294 (`x = y * (((x * y) * z) * w)`) implies Equation 4664 (`(x * y) * y = (z * x) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0919
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x y) z) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op (op x y) y) = (op (op z x) w)
